meta.title: Camil Saunier — Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Camil Saunier — Full Stack Developer (React, Node.js). Career-changer, ex-telecom. Projects, background and skills.

hero.name: Camil Saunier
hero.taglinePrefix: With the right tools and the right people, anything

about.title: About
about.lead: Full stack developer and career-changer, driven by curiosity and a love of teamwork.
about.p1: Before getting into code, I spent nearly 6 years as a Field Operations Technician on FTTH/FTTB fiber networks — handling troubleshooting, major outages, and 24/7 on-call shifts — in an environment where rigor, autonomy, and critical situation management are the norm.
about.p2: Prior to that, two years working in Australia and three years in the non-profit sector (while earning a DEJEPS diploma) taught me to adapt quickly and collaborate with highly diverse profiles.
about.p3: In 2024-2025, I transitioned into tech by earning my Full-Stack Web Developer certification (DWWM), followed by two internships where I delivered concrete features. I thrive on teamwork, learning, and evolving: today, I'm looking for a team where I can channel this energy into ambitious projects.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My developer journey and the background that fuels it.

semantik.description: HR-Tech platform matching candidates with top-school programmes. Led a full UI overhaul of the front-end, added AI tools (candidate pre-filtering, profile autofill) and built type-safe Node.js/TSOA APIs. Async jobs with BullMQ/Redis, environments managed via Docker.

mostache.description: Rebuilt, in React, the front-end of an internal tool tracking customers, sellers, stores and products. Integrated charts and real-time statistics on top of an existing back-end, following the brand's high standards.

dwwm.description: Retraining as a Web and Mobile Web Developer, in remote-live format with a final exam in Paris. Covered front-end, back-end, databases and web application deployment.

telecom.description: Diagnostics and fault-fixing on FTTH/FTTB networks, 24/7 on-call response and mentoring of junior technicians. A zero-tolerance environment that forged my rigour and autonomy — reflexes I carry straight into development.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my work. As the professional repositories are private, I show screenshots and write-ups.

one.title: Semantik Match Platform
one.description: UI/UX overhaul of the candidate platform, a profile autofill feature and AI-driven candidate pre-filtering. Type-safe Node.js/TSOA APIs and BullMQ/Redis job queues.

details.intro: Internship at Semantik, a SaaS recruitment and admissions platform for top schools (HEC Paris, Oxford SBS). Several full-stack features built in React, TypeScript, Node.js and PostgreSQL.
features: Complete visual overhaul of the candidate application.
Form autofill system populated from the candidate profile.
End-to-end interview booking feature integrated with Google Calendar: slot generation, real-time sync via webhooks and notification handling.

two.title: Moustache Bikes Internal Portal
two.description: Internal management tool (customers, stores, sellers, products) rebuilt in React, with dashboards and real-time statistics for dealer-network managers.

details.intro: Internship at Moustache Bikes, a premium e-bike manufacturer. Rebuilt an internal dealer-network management tool in React and TypeScript on top of an existing back-end.
features: Complete front-end rebuild of the internal tool (customers, sellers, stores, products).
Dashboards and real-time statistics charts for network managers.
Careful integration following the brand's guidelines and UX standards.

three.title: MS Climatisations
three.description: Showcase website built for an air-conditioning and refrigeration company (HVAC technician) operating in the Vosges and Meurthe-et-Moselle regions of France. Services presentation, branding and local SEO.

details.intro: Showcase website for an air-conditioning and refrigeration company operating in the Vosges (88) and Meurthe-et-Moselle (54) areas of France.
features: Clear presentation of the services and the company.
Local SEO optimisation for regional visibility.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: An opportunity, a question, or just want to chat? I'll be glad to reply.

footer.builtWith: Designed and built with React, no UI framework
